title: 社群建设 Community Building
description: Build engaged communities across platforms — the social layer that drives retention

tasks.text: Create QQ group for Chinese-speaking community
Create Discord server for English-speaking / international community
Set up weekly puzzle challenge in community (vote on best move)
Host first viewer challenge match (play subscribers live on stream)
Create community roles/tiers for active members
Monthly community tournament with small prizes
Create WeChat group for closest fans (gated behind engagement threshold)
